title: Cinematic Elevator Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Elevator Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Modern cinematic editorial portrait built around adult woman standing in a high-end elevator, tailored long-sleeve satin midi dress in cool graphite hue with a high neckline, and brushed steel high-end elevator cabin with mirrored walls and ambient ceiling lighting. Subject: adult woman standing in a high-end elevator stands with quiet confidence, natural adult proportions, refined expression, and polished editorial presence. Scene: brushed steel high-end elevator cabin with mirrored walls and ambient ceiling lighting provides the brushed steel, mirrored-wall, ambient ceiling-light environment with narrow cinematic depth. Composition: quiet confident smile with relaxed upright posture and subtle cinematic poise; fixed vertical editorial portrait inside a high-end elevator, slightly enclosed framing, reflective side walls, and clean fashion hierarchy. Signature Elements: The template identity is the quiet confident woman, cool graphite satin, high-end elevator cabin, mirrored walls, and cinematic metal-reflection mood. Style: Modern cinematic editorial portrait with high-end fashion restraint, realistic skin texture, glossy metal reflections, quiet luxury mood, and polished magazine finish. Color Palette: Fixed cool graphite, brushed steel silver, soft ceiling white, muted skin tones, mirror neutrals, and restrained cinematic contrast. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Vertical fashion portrait framing with natural lens perspective, elevator depth, mirrored wall reflections, and sharp wardrobe detail. Materials: tailored long-sleeve satin midi dress in cool graphite hue with a high neckline remains tactile with satin sheen, brushed steel, mirror glass, soft ceiling panels, and natural skin detail. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
